summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shano's Skips website. All frontend functionality working perfectly. Backend API functional with minor validation issue.

minor_bugs.issue: API accepts invalid contact submissions (empty name, invalid email) when it should return 422 validation error
minor_bugs.impact: Low - doesn't affect user experience as frontend has proper validation

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, services grid, skip bin teaser, CTA section
Navigation bar with all 7 page links works correctly
Skip Bin Sizes page shows 4 bin cards (2m³, 3m³, 4m³, 6m³) with SVG visuals
Waste Guide page shows do's and don'ts lists, e-waste section, general waste section
Delivery Area page shows Google Map iframe and 10 town pills
About Us page shows company story and 6 value cards
FAQ page shows 6 accordion items that expand/collapse correctly
Contact Us page form with all required fields (name, email, phone, message)
Contact form submission via POST /api/contact stores in MongoDB successfully
Success toast notification appears after form submission
Form fields clear after successful submission
Footer shows contact info, quick links, and Facebook link
Mobile menu toggle works on small screens
All pages scroll to top on navigation
Contact submissions can be retrieved from database
action_item_for_main_agent: Add backend validation for contact form submissions to reject empty required fields and invalid email formats
